notableEvents.label: Andrew McCutchen pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Andrew McCutchen flies out to left fielder Lourdes Gurriel Jr.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Rangers challenged (play at 1st), call on the field was upheld: pitcher Taylor Clarke picks off Sam Haggerty at 1st on throw to first baseman Ildemaro Vargas.
